name: forge_audit_secrets
description: Scan staged + working changes for credential / token / key leaks. Equivalent to gitleaks but typed + respects the substrate's allowlist (test fixtures, doctrine examples, etc.). Use this instead of `gitleaks detect` — the substrate-native tool understands which strings are real secrets vs documentation. Per AVP-Doctrine rule sec-003.

explain.description: For each match, name the detector pattern that matched.

json.description: Emit JSON instead of human-readable text.
